title: Police jury member and tax collector ineligible for treasurer
doc_html:
§1653.  Police jury member and tax collector ineligible for treasurer

No member of the police jury shall be eligible as parish treasurer.

No person shall hold at the same time the two offices of parish treasurer and collector of parish taxes.

§1653.  Police jury member and tax collector ineligible for treasurer
No member of the police jury shall be eligible as parish treasurer.
No person shall hold at the same time the two offices of parish treasurer and collector of parish taxes.
